summary: Iteration 63 - Testing Auto-Confirmation Reservation System and 'En attente' to 'Confirmee' wording changes. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend wording verified via Playwright - 'Confirmee' status labels found, 'En attente' NOT found anywhere.
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-confirmation working: POST /api/reservations returns status='confirmed' for both card and cash payments
Email templates verified: generate_reservation_confirmation_email, generate_payment_confirmation_email, generate_reminder_24h_email all include CI/permis reminder
Frontend wording updated: All STATUS_MAP entries for 'pending' now show 'Confirmee' instead of 'En attente'

Files verified with correct wording: TodayReservationCard.tsx, ReservationCard.tsx, ReservationActionModal.tsx, GanttChart.tsx, reservations.tsx (agency-app), index.tsx (agency-app), reservations.tsx (tabs), profile.tsx, calendar.tsx (admin)
Overlap check in reservations.py only considers 'confirmed' and 'active' statuses (not 'pending' or 'pending_cash')
24h reminder cron in server.py only looks for 'confirmed' status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-confirmation system verified working. All reservations now get status='confirmed' immediately (no more 'pending' or 'pending_cash'). Frontend wording changed from 'En attente' to 'Confirmee' across all agency and client views. Email templates include CI/permis reminder. 24h reminder cron sends emails for 'confirmed' reservations starting tomorrow.

email_templates.payment_confirmation_email: PASS - French HTML with CI/permis reminder
email_templates.reminder_24h_email: PASS - French HTML with CI/permis reminder and 'demain' reference
